title: Sell Alert: 3 Tech Stocks to Dump ASAP
text: The recent rally in the stock market has pleased investors with outstanding returns. With the earnings season going on in full swing, investors have high expectations from companies, especially the top tech companies.

title: 5 Top-Performing Stocks of the Top ETF of July
text: First Trust SkyBridge Crypto Industry & Digital Economy ETF (CRPT), which provides exposure to the crypto industry and digital economy companies, has gained about 29.4%, becoming the second-best performing ETF of July.

title: SEC looks to craft new rules on use of AI by online brokers
text: The Securities and Exchange Commission will vote Wednesday on whether to propose new rules targeting online stock brokers and other companies that use artificial intelligence and similar technologies to power interactions with their customers.

title: 5 Crypto Stocks to Watch as Fed May Hike Rate in July
text: We have narrowed our search to five stocks with solid crypto exposure and strong growth potential. These are: NVDA, HOOD, SHOP, COIN, MARA.

title: Robinhood Money Drills Partners with University of Memphis to Launch Financial Education Programming
text: MENLO PARK, Calif., July 20, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As part of its flagship Robinhood Money Drills initiative, Robinhood Markets, Inc. is partnering with the University of Memphis to launch a program to make financial education coursework available to the university's student-athletes.

title: Robinhood heads to the UK
text: Silicon Valley trading platform Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ:HOOD), which sprung to fame during the 2021 meme stock frenzy, is preparing to open its services up to UK customers. First reported by the Telegraph, the group has published numerous job listings on LinkedIn.

title: Why These 3 Stocks Are the Worst Ways to Play Fintech Right Now
text: The major indices entered a new bull market in 2023, and investors are once again flocking to more speculative growth stocks. As such, some previously poor-performing fintech stocks have rebounded sharply.

title: Ark Invest liquidates Coinbase shares, buys Robinhood & Meta shares
text: Ark Invest, the investment management company run by Cathie Wood, has sold some of its holdings in Coinbase as the stock price approaches a 52-week high. Ark Invest sold off a portion of its Coinbase shares holdings for millions of dollars twice this week after buying them during the bear market.

title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Robinhood Markets' Neutral Recommendation
text: Fintel reports that on July 13, 2023, Goldman Sachs maintained coverage of Robinhood Markets Inc.

title: Robinhood Shifts From Short-Term Trades To Long-Term Stability: Begins Offering IRAs - Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ:HOOD)
text: Renowned for its gamification, commission-free trades, and a spike in retail investor activity in 2021, Robinhood Markets Inc HOOD is now expanding into an unfamiliar area: retirement planning.

title: Robinhood: The Turnaround Is In Motion - 60% Net Cash, Forgotten Meme Stock
text: Robinhood is a forgotten meme stock which has seen its valuation reset. The higher interest rate environment has helped spur growth in net deposits and net interest income. Robinhood has generated positive adjusted EBITDA for three consecutive quarters and has nearly $6 billion of net cash on its balance sheet.

title: Strength Seen in Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD): Can Its 5.5% Jump Turn into More Strength?
text: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.

title: Cathie Wood Can't Get Enough of Robinhood Stock. Should You Follow Her Lead?
text: Robinhood's user base is growing, providing it with more transaction fee income and net interest revenue. The company is closing in on profitability thanks to its higher revenue and cost cutting.

title: Focus on These 5 Crypto Stocks for Long-Term Gains
text: We have narrowed our search to five stocks with solid crypto exposure and strong growth potential. These are: PYPL, SQ, HOOD, COIN, MSTR.

title: Robinhood Markets, Inc. to Announce Second Quarter 2023 Results on August 2, 2023
text: MENLO PARK, Calif., July 05, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Today, Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD) announced that it will release its second quarter 2023 financial results on Wednesday, August 2, 2023 after market close. An earnings conference call will be held at 2:00 PM PT/5:00 PM ET on the same day. A live webcast of the call and supporting materials will be available at investors.robinhood.com. Following the call, a replay and transcript will also be available on the same website.

title: 2 Stocks to Watch in the Second Half of 2023
text: In the first half of 2023, amidst record inflation, a regional banking crisis, and signs of a bull market return, stocks surprisingly hit all-time highs, warranting attention to two particular stocks in the upcoming half amidst looming rate hikes and a potential global recession.
